flags.message: CourtListener MCP server was unusable this run: every call failed server-side with 'REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store'. The prediction rests on the provisioned snapshot, fedcourts corpus priors, and general legal context only.

Forward-mode cell with a stale record: the docket was last indexed 2020-03-25 and is marked blocked on CourtListener since 2021-04-18, while the appeal was docketed 2019-11-01. In reality this appeal has very likely been decided years ago, so the cell behaves like an unlabeled replay; I avoided refreshing the docket to prevent outcome leakage. Consider verifying the mode/eligibility of long-stale forward cells.
